productDisplayName: Nike Men's Lunarelite Black Green Shoe
description: SHAPED FOR YOUR EVERY STRIDE Incredibly lightweight with a smooth transition, the nike LunarElite+ model of shoes for men are designed for those who love to run. Without sacrificing on cushioning and shock absorption, the nike LunarElite+ range of shoes is designed in such a manner that it adapts to your stride &ndash be it long or short.  Great deal for underpronators and overpronators The Nike LunarElite+ range of shoes are specially engineered for runners with underpronated to moderately overpronated gait. Underpronated and overpronated runners strike the ground at the lateral side of the heel. As the individual transfers weight from the heel to the metatarsus, the foot doesn&rsquo t roll enough in the medial (inside) direction for overpronators and in the lateral (outside) direction for underpronators, which could affect the knee as the foot doesn&rsquo t absorb shock properly. However, the difference lies in the fact that in an underpronator, the ankles do not experience much motion and are rigid, while in an overpronator, the ankles roll inwards making one fall forward easily. Nike realized that it had the responsibility to create the right running shoes that could cater to both underpronators and overpronators, with ample support on both, the lateral and medial sides. This responsibility that it took up resulted in the creation of the Nike LunarElite+ model of shoes. 360 degrees of comfort Without sacrificing on cushioning, the Nike LunarElite+ range of shoes was created with ultra-light, yet ultra-strong Flywire upper. The Flywire is a lightweight support system that is made of tensile fibres that are joined together to create a foundation to construct the upper material of the shoe. It acts like a super strong synthetic ligament, wrapping around the foot and supporting it precisely where it needs that extra support, mapping the foot morphology like an X-ray. Flywire acts like the second skin giving the runner that ultimate freedom and strength in moving backwards, forwards, sideways, up and down. Think of the direction and Nike LunarElite+ shoes will help you move that way with complete convenience, locking your foot down. This range of shoes is created with open mesh uppers with strategic overlays for enhanced support at targeted areas of the upper foot to enhance performance, comfort and breathability. The no-sew design employed in key zones ensure proper fitting and enhance comfort. To add to this snug Fit of the upper is the Lunarlon cushioning system in the midsole that adds on a plush cushioning to absorb shock protecting the feet, besides adding that extra spring in gait. The dynamic support system adapts to the runner&rsquo s stride, adding that specific support to every phase of the run. Ultimate in protection Besides, Nike LunarElite+ shoes are engineered with a dual layer Ortholite insole that is strong and breathable, replete with anti-microbial foam, making this model of shoes ideal for athletes. The cushioned sockliner is made of long lasting material and adds an exceptional step-in feel, while the memory foam at the collar ensures absolute comfort and fit. The Nike LunarElite+ range of shoes are made of environmentally preferred rubber and employ a modified waffle outsole that makes the shoes durable and multi-surface tractional. The heel unit is made of highly durable carbon rubber, reducing wear and tear, while the flex grooves enhance flexibility, ensuring a smooth and efficient Nike run. Shoe care 1. Brush surface with a soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine wash
